headline: Inside India newsletter: Ikea has high hopes for the country as it stares at a global slowdown
summary: Amid slowing global sales and store closures in China, Ikea has high hopes for India.

headline: S&P Global Announces: Mobility Global to Host Investor Day on May 12, 2026
summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE: SPGI) announced today that its Mobility division ("Mobility Global") will host its inaugural Investor Day on May 12, 2026, in New York City, as it prepares for its planned separation from S&P Global into a standalone public company in mid-2026.

raw.headline: S&P Global Announces: Mobility Global to Host Investor Day on May 12, 2026
raw.summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE: SPGI) announced today that its Mobility division ("Mobility Global") will host its inaugural Investor Day on May 12, 2026, in New York City, as it prepares for its planned separation from S&P Global into a standalone public company in mid-2026.

headline: Trump administration waives summer gasoline regulations to address surging fuel prices
summary: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin said the waivers will help prevent a fuel supply disruption in the U.S. during the Iran war.

raw.headline: Trump administration waives summer gasoline regulations to address surging fuel prices
raw.summary: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin said the waivers will help prevent a fuel supply disruption in the U.S. during the Iran war.

headline: S&P Global Awards Energy Vault Highest ESG Score for Energy Storage Company for Second Straight Year, Energy Vault Publishes 2025 Corporate Sustainability Report
summary: WESTLAKE VILLAGE, Calif., March 25, 2026--Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: NRGV) ("Energy Vault" or the "Company"), a global leader in sustainable, grid-scale energy storage solutions, today announced the publication of its 2025 Corporate Sustainability Report (the "report"), highlighting significant operational achievements, strategic market expansion, and continued progress on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) priorities.

headline: ECB ready to hike rates even if expected inflation surge is short-lived, Lagarde says
summary: The ECB kept interest rates on hold at its last monetary policy meeting last week.

raw.headline: ECB ready to hike rates even if expected inflation surge is short-lived, Lagarde says

headline: Watch Interior Secretary Burgum address oil industry as Trump hints at negotiated end to Iran war
summary: Investors will be looking for updates from Burgum, who also chairs Trump's energy dominance council, on the state of the U.S. war against Iran
